title: SmokeyWool
description: Today, on July 15, my cat Smokey turns 15 years old and in honor of this I created a texture pack in which all the wool will be replaced with his muzzle :D
body:
Today, on July 15, my cat Smokey turns 15 years old and in honor of this I created a texture pack in which all the wool will be replaced with his muzzle :D

- This texture pack supports CTM



Happy Birthday, Smokey!
